review_text: Really loving these headphones! Sound quality is excellent and the bass is punchy. Bluetooth pairs instantly every time. 5 stars for audio. Only issue is the ear cups press really tight — my ears start aching after about 20 minutes of use. Still a great buy for the price and I'd recommend them for short listening sessions.

cons: ear aching after 20 minutes of use

scoring_notes.notes: urgency MUST be high — physical harm signal (ear aching after 20 min) regardless of 5-star audio praise or overall positive tone. Tone must not mask harm. Regression guard for the harm-in-positive-tone miss (benchmark case en-013).
